items.title: New wallet offers way to tackle Bitcoin’s quantum risk without a fork
items.desc: The Postquant Labs project uses Arch Network to deliver post-quantum signature protection without a Bitcoin soft fork, sidestepping both Jameson Lopp's freeze proposal and Paul Sztorc's hard fork.

items.title: Solana clients Anza and Firedancer introduce post-quantum solution Falcon
items.desc: Jump Crypto, the team behind Firedancer, said Falcon has the smallest signature among NIST standards, which could help preserve Solana’s high-throughput capabilities.

items.title: Aave, Compound Unveil Technical Plan to Address Fallout From $290M Kelp DAO Hack
items.desc: Major DeFi protocols outlined technical steps to eliminate bad debt and restore full backing for exploited rsETH tokens.

items.title: Block (XYZ) Touts Bitcoin as ‘Everyday Money’ With 800,000 Merchants Now Accepting It
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Block (XYZ) Touts Bitcoin as ‘Everyday Money’ With 800,000 Merchants Now Accepting It Block is accelerating its push to make bitcoin everyday money, with Miles Suter unveiling new payments, rewards, and self-custody tools at Bitcoin 2026 alongside proof of $2.2 billion in BTC reserves. This post Block (XYZ) Touts Bitcoin as ‘Everyday Money’ With 800,000 Merchants Now Accepting It first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Canaan, Tether deepen partnership on immersion-cooled mining systems
items.desc: Canaan secures a new Tether order for modular mining hardware as the stablecoin issuer expands into integrated, data center-style Bitcoin infrastructure.

items.title: World Cup fever: Chiliz expands to Solana and Base to supercharge fan token trading
items.desc: Chiliz rolled out its own layer-1 network in 2023 to host the trading of its tokens, but is transitioning to what it calls "omnichain distribution."

items.title: Polymarket eyes return of main exchange to the US, in talks with CFTC: Bloomberg
items.desc: Polymarket is exploring a path to bring its main exchange back to the United States, according to reporting from Bloomberg.

items.title: Stablecoin Giant Tether Reveals Plans for Modular Bitcoin Mining Hardware
items.desc: Leading stablecoin issuer Tether has teamed with Canaan and ACME Swisstech to develop customizable, upgradable Bitcoin mining rigs.

items.title: Polymarket Seeks Full CFTC Approval for Its Main Platform: Report
items.desc: The move would let Polymarket's primary, on-chain prediction market platform operate in the United States, rather than through its current intermediated setup with Polymarket US.

items.title: Riot extends $200 million Coinbase credit facility, and bitcoin weakness could mean more sales
items.desc: The miner locked in fixed borrowing costs and extended maturity, but a shrinking BTC treasury and loan-to-value triggers leave little room for error if prices slide.

items.title: Galaxy posts $216 million Q1 loss amid crypto ‘transition year,’ Novogratz bullish on data center growth
items.desc: Galaxy’s data center business is nearing an inflection point, with revenue expected to ramp up in the second quarter.

items.title: Bitcoin price hits one-week low as $100 oil sparks fresh Asia crisis fears
items.desc: Bitcoin price downside returned to send BTC to one-week lows thanks to renewed concerns over global oil supplies focused on the Strait of Hormuz blockade.

items.title: RWA yield platform Nuva, co-incubated by Animoca, raises $5.2 million in seed funding
items.desc: Nuva is a marketplace for tokenized real-world assets that aims to help users earn yield by connecting issuers and users directly.

items.title: Amboss launches RailsX for self-custodial bitcoin and stablecoin trading on Lightning
items.desc: RailsX launches with bitcoin-stablecoin pairs USDT-L and USDC-L from Speed Wallet, with users retaining full control of their keys.

items.title: Blockstream Launches Jade Core to Simplify Bitcoin Self-Custody Without Sacrificing Security
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Blockstream Launches Jade Core to Simplify Bitcoin Self-Custody Without Sacrificing Security Blockstream has launched Jade Core, a simplified, open-source hardware wallet designed to make Bitcoin self-custody more accessible to a broader range of users. This post Blockstream Launches Jade Core to Simplify Bitcoin Self-Custody Without Sacrificing Security first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: BitMart x EAT Trade-to-Feed competition to pay out $4.4m USDT to traders in May 2026
items.desc: The 30-day Trade-to-Feed competition marks BitMart's 8th anniversary and the exchange's strategic listing of EAT, the first cause coin.

items.title: A crypto coalition releases technical proposal to save Aave users from a massive token exploit
items.desc: DeFi United, a coalition of multiple blockchain projects and crypto ecosystem individuals, has laid out a detailed plan to restore the backing of rsETH after this month’s Kelp DAO hack sent shockwaves through lending markets.

items.title: Hyperliquid Gains Counter $216 Million Q1 Loss at Novogratz's Galaxy Digital
items.desc: CEO Mike Novogratz said Galaxy Digital’s balance sheet suffered because crypto prices are down, yet Hyperliquid partially offset losses.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.desc: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: 'Crypto Godfather' says bitcoin has not reached its bottom and a new all-time high is off the table for 2026
items.desc: The early bitcoin investor and author of Bitcoin Supercycle says bitcoin needs to drop to about $57,000 sometime in October before beginning its ascent. A market analyst disagrees.

items.title: Amboss Activates RailsX, Enabling Self-Custody Stablecoin Trading on Bitcoin Lightning
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Amboss Activates RailsX, Enabling Self-Custody Stablecoin Trading on Bitcoin Lightning Amboss' RailsX goes live with USDT-L and USDC-L, bringing peer-to-peer, self-custodial stablecoin trading to the Lightning Network for the first time. This post Amboss Activates RailsX, Enabling Self-Custody Stablecoin Trading on Bitcoin Lightning first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Tether develops modular bitcoin mining systems with Canaan in latest infrastructure push
items.desc: Tether said it is developing new modular bitcoin mining systems with Canaan and ACME Swisstech in a deeper pusher into infrastructure.

items.title: AML crackdown eclipses securities enforcement as crypto’s top regulatory risk: Report
items.desc: US Anti-Money Laundering fines hit $900 million in the first half of 2025 as enforcement shifted from securities cases, while Basel rules and mandatory audits reshape crypto compliance, according to CertiK.

items.title: Can Bitcoin hit $250K this year? Traders say it may be time to ‘sell in May’
items.desc: Veteran trader Peter Brandt and other analysts question the $250,000 Bitcoin target, warning the current bear phase may not be over.

items.title: Not a theft, but a statement: Inside the Bitcoin proposal to reassign Satoshi-linked coins
items.desc: Paul Sztorc says he can't move a single sat of Satoshi's bitcoin and isn't trying to. But critics say rewriting forked-chain balances at addresses a user does not control sets a bad precedent.

items.title: Crypto projects shut down as token models fail under pressure
items.desc: Crypto projects are shutting down as token funding weakens and fragmented structures leave them with limited options to restructure or recover.

items.title: Japan tells real estate and crypto sectors to tighten AML checks on property deals
items.desc: Four Japanese government agencies have warned against the AML risks posed by crypto in real estate transactions, instructing industry bodies to enforce stricter compliance.

items.title: Visa taps former Tether CEO’s WeFi to connect crypto to its payment network
items.desc: The collaboration adds to a rapidly growing list of initiatives between existing payment networks and digital asset firms.

items.title: Stablecoin payroll gets built-in yield with Paxos–Toku integration
items.desc: The integration lets employees earn yield on stablecoin-paid salaries without moving funds or giving up custody.

items.title: Aave-linked DeFi United unveils rsETH recovery plan after $293M Kelp exploit
items.desc: DeFi United published a technical plan to restore rsETH backing and unwind attacker-linked DeFi positions after the $293 million Kelp exploit.

items.title: Visa is teaming up with a Tether co-founder to build onchain banks
items.desc: Collins wants to bring robust stablecoin payments infrastructure to under-banked people around the planet.

items.title: State Street to launch tokenized fund servicing from Luxembourg by year’s end
items.desc: State Street said it plans to launch tokenized fund servicing from Luxembourg by the end of 2026, as firms predict a tokenization boom.

items.title: White House Crypto Adviser Hints at ‘Breakthrough’ Bitcoin Reserve Move
items.desc: A "big announcement" on the U.S. Bitcoin strategic reserve could drop soon, but Treasury and a stalled Senate bill continue to set limits.

items.title: Stablecoin payroll firm Toku taps Paxos Labs’ Amplify to offer yield on paychecks
items.desc: Toku has integrated Paxos Labs’ Amplify platform, enabling employees to earn yield on their pay “the moment it lands.”

items.title: Startale to add Privacy Boost transfers to Sony-linked Soneium app
items.desc: Startale plans to integrate Sunnyside Labs’ Privacy Boost into its Soneium app, adding private transfers with audit-friendly compliance controls.

items.title: Bitcoin's Next Move Hinges on $82K CME Gap as Earnings, FOMC Loom
items.desc: Big Tech earnings and the FOMC are challenging investor risk appetite, with $82K as a make-or-break level for Bitcoin’s recovery rally.

items.title: US SEC seeks comment on NYSE Arca proposal for 85% eligible-asset rule in crypto ETF listings
items.desc: The SEC is seeking public comment on an NYSE Arca proposal requiring 85% of a commodity-based crypto trust’s assets to meet existing listing rules.

items.title: Is Ethereum safe above $2K? Traders are watching these ETH price levels
items.desc: Ethereum market participants saw the 100-day SMA at $2,200 as particularly important for bulls to hold to avoid a deeper correction.

items.title: Morning Minute: Fidelity Is Cautiously Bullish on Crypto
items.desc: Fidelity says crypto may finally be finding its floor, while the White House is teasing a major strategic Bitcoin reserve update.

items.title: Bulls want bitcoin back above $80,000. Macro says not so fast.
items.desc: What you need to know for April 28, 2026

items.title: OKX lets institutions use BlackRock’s BUIDL fund as trading collateral
items.desc: OKX integrates BlackRock’s tokenized Treasury fund into Standard Chartered custody, allowing institutions to use it as regulated trading collateral.

items.title: Crypto traders turn cautious as bitcoin loses steam below $80,000
items.desc: Bitcoin drops after repeated resistance at $80,000, taking ether with it, while derivatives and macro signals point to reduced risk appetite and subdued volatility.

items.title: Jack Dorsey's Block Discloses $2.2B Bitcoin Holdings in Q1 Proof-of-Reserves Report
items.desc: The fintech company's third-party audited disclosure shows $1.5 billion in customer Bitcoin and $692 million in corporate treasury holdings.

items.title: Bitcoin ETF outflows snap nine-day streak ahead of FOMC as market tests resolve near $77,000
items.desc: Analysts weighed bitcoin's bullish momentum against growing policy and geopolitical caution after ETF flows reversed amid a key macro week.

items.title: A digital shekel is here: Israel approves its first regulated stablecoin
items.desc: BILS was developed in collaboration with the Solana network and crypto custodian heavyweights Fireblocks with auditing oversight provided by Big Four consultancy firm EY.

items.title: Changelly and Tonkeeper enable cross-chain deposits to TON across 13 networks
items.desc: Changelly and Tonkeeper have teamed up to make cross-chain deposits into TON a seamless, in-wallet experience.

items.title: Bitcoin ETFs snap nine-day inflow run as BTC slips below $77K
items.desc: US spot Bitcoin ETFs post $263 million in outflows, ending a nine-day inflow streak as Bitcoin failed to reclaim $80,000 in its latest run.

items.title: Jack Dorsey's Block nears 9,000 bitcoin in treasury after Q1 addition
items.desc: The firm added 114 BTC to its corporate treasury, for a total of 8,997 BTC, and said it plans to issue regular third-party reports.

items.title: Jack Dorsey’s Block reveals $2.2 billion in bitcoin holdings in Q1
items.desc: Jack Dorsey's Block Inc. disclosed that it held a total of 28,355 BTC, including customer assets, as of March 2026.

items.title: Crypto lobby backs formal removal of ‘reputation risk’ from bank examinations
items.desc: The Office of the Comptroller of the Currency and the Federal Deposit Insurance Corp. finalized a similar rule removing reputation risk earlier this month.

items.title: Paystand launches Bitcoin-based stablecoin USDb for enterprise payments
items.desc: The US dollar-backed token will roll out across Paystand’s network, which the company says has processed more than $20 billion in business payments.

items.title: DeFi United unveils plan to restore rsETH after $292 million Kelp DAO exploit
items.desc: The restoration process involves converting ETH into rsETH in tranches, which will then be transferred to the affected lockbox contract.

items.title: Three Bank of Japan members call for a rate hike; yen rises while bitcoin falls
items.desc: Markets are pricing in a June rate hike after a split BoJ vote that saw three policymakers dissent in favor of a hike.

items.title: Acting AG Todd Blanche confirms ‘code is not a crime’ in DOJ pivot
items.desc: Acting US Attorney General Todd Blanche said developers will no longer be investigated or charged unless they knowingly help third parties commit crimes.

items.title: Dorsey's Block unveils Bitcoin proof-of-reserves in transparency move
items.desc: Block’s proof-of-reserves will enable anyone to verify the company’s 8,883 Bitcoin stash worth over $680 million through an on-chain signature.

items.title: Bitcoin loses $77,000, ether, solana slide as Hormuz standoff lifts oil to 3-week high
items.desc: Bitcoin traded at $76,923 on Tuesday morning, down 2.4% over 24 hours after rejecting $79,400 the previous day, with the entire top 10 closing red as Brent crude extended its rally to a seventh straight day.

items.title: MARA forms foundation to support Bitcoin network health, adoption
items.desc: As part of its launch, the MARA Foundation has asked the community to vote on which of three Bitcoin companies should receive a $100,000 contribution.

items.title: Japan’s Bitbank rolls out crypto-linked credit card that pays bills in bitcoin
items.desc: The card will allow users to pay their credit card bill in bitcoin, and receive a 0.5% cashback in crypto for their spending.

items.title: Saipan woman gets 71 months in prison for bitcoin fraud targeting senior victims
items.desc: The criminal built trust with her targets and solicited bitcoin investments under false pretenses, according to the DOJ.

items.title: ZetaChain halts cross-chain transactions following attack on smart contract
items.desc: The attack has only impacted internal ZetaChain team wallets, and no user funds were affected, the team said.

items.title: Billionaire Tim Draper: You Should Be Scared If You Don’t Own Bitcoin
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Billionaire Tim Draper: You Should Be Scared If You Don’t Own Bitcoin Billionare Tim Draper said that bitcoin has gone mainstream, with growing adoption signaling the early stages of a broader shift in the global financial system. This post Billionaire Tim Draper: You Should Be Scared If You Don’t Own Bitcoin first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Industry leaders are pouring hundreds of millions into a rescue plan for Aave users after massive crypto hack
items.desc: The response to the DeFi recovery fund has quickly extended beyond Aave, and in some cases began with direct outreach.

items.title: House Republicans Warn That the America’s Bitcoin Weakness Will Benefit China
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine House Republicans Warn That the America’s Bitcoin Weakness Will Benefit China At Bitcoin 2026 in Las Vegas, three Republican members of Congress framed crypto regulation as a national security and economic competitiveness issue, arguing that U.S. leadership in digital assets is essential to counter China. This post House Republicans Warn That the America’s Bitcoin Weakness Will Benefit China first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Lawmakers Warn Crypto Clarity Will Decide U.S. Leadership as 2026 Election Looms
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Lawmakers Warn Crypto Clarity Will Decide U.S. Leadership as 2026 Election Looms U.S. lawmakers and White House officials said that clear crypto rules will determine whether the U.S. leads financial innovation, with Sen. Cynthia Lummis warning that another hostile administration could mean “game over” for sensible regulation. This post Lawmakers Warn Crypto Clarity Will Decide U.S. Leadership as 2026 Election Looms first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Aave-Led 'DeFi United' Relief Effort Raises $300 Million to Cover Kelp DAO Exploit Losses
items.desc: The Aave-led relief effort has gained widespread support, securing enough commitments to replenish the swiped funds.

items.title: ‘We don’t take Satoshi’s bitcoin’: eCash fork sparks backlash over ‘reassigned’ coins
items.desc: The eCash fork will act as a live test of Paul Sztorc’s long-running drivechains-sidechains vision for the bitcoin network.

items.title: Bitcoin Developer Plans to 'Reassign' Coins Linked to Satoshi Nakamoto in Hard Fork
items.desc: Paul Sztorc’s proposed eCash fork would give investors coins cloned from wallets believed to belong to Bitcoin creator Satoshi Nakamoto.

items.title: NFTs Attempt Another Comeback as Blue Chips Surge
items.desc: Bored Apes, Mutant Apes, Pudgy Penguins, Azuki and Doodles are all up double digits on the month.

items.title: Aven Launches Bitcoin-Backed Visa Card Offering Up to $1 Million Credit Lines Without Asset Sales
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Aven Launches Bitcoin-Backed Visa Card Offering Up to $1 Million Credit Lines Without Asset Sales Aven has launched a Bitcoin Visa credit card that lets users borrow against their Bitcoin holdings — offering lines of credit up to $1 million without selling assets or triggering taxable events. This post Aven Launches Bitcoin-Backed Visa Card Offering Up to $1 Million Credit Lines Without Asset Sales first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: SEC, CFTC Chiefs Signal ‘New Day’ for U.S. Onshore Crypto, Tokenization and Future‑Proof Rules
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine SEC, CFTC Chiefs Signal ‘New Day’ for U.S. Onshore Crypto, Tokenization and Future‑Proof Rules Paul Atkins and Mike Selig signaled a coordinated regulatory reset at the Bitcoin 2026 Conference, emphasizing onshore crypto development and clearer token classification. This post SEC, CFTC Chiefs Signal ‘New Day’ for U.S. Onshore Crypto, Tokenization and Future‑Proof Rules first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Sky Proposes to Streamline Treasury Management
items.desc: With Genesis Capital fully deployed, the protocol looks to shift from governance-determined capital outflows to rules-bound expenses capped at a fixed percentage of revenue.

items.title: Paystand Launches USDb Stablecoin on Bitcoin Layers for $100T B2B Payments
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Paystand Launches USDb Stablecoin on Bitcoin Layers for $100T B2B Payments Paystand, the Bitcoin-powered B2B payments network processing over $20B in volume, today launched USDb, a 1:1 USD-backed stablecoin native to Blockstream’s Liquid and Rootstock layers for commercial-scale accounts receivable, payable, payroll, and treasury. This post Paystand Launches USDb Stablecoin on Bitcoin Layers for $100T B2B Payments first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Juan Galt.

items.title: Publicly Traded Strive Buys $60 Million in Bitcoin, Plans BTC Business Summit
items.desc: Strive Inc. purchased 789 more Bitcoin while its subsidiary prepares to educate business leaders on corporate crypto adoption.

items.title: DeFi United Hits Recovery Target as Consensys, Solana, TRON Pledge Support
items.desc: The DeFi United coalition crossed its rsETH backing target after a flood of weekend commitments from across the Ethereum, Solana, TRON, Avalanche, and Bitcoin ecosystems.

items.title: Litecoin Rewrites Transaction History After Exploit, Apologizes for Social Posts
items.desc: Litecoin was affected by a bug this weekend that allowed an attacker to transfer digital assets—transactions that were later wiped away.

items.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Makes Biggest Ethereum Buy So Far in 2026, Hitting 5 Million ETH Milestone
items.desc: BitMine Immersion Technologies now holds over 5 million ETH, following the leading Ethereum treasury firm's biggest buy since December.

items.title: CFTC Chairman Endorses Prediction Markets as Valuable for Hedging and Information Discovery: Selig
items.desc: CFTC Chairman Rostin Behnam said prediction markets provide measurable value to participants and the public, committing the agency to setting regulatory standards for the sector.

items.title: Maple Finance Surpasses $7B in Total Bridge Volume: Maple
items.desc: Maple Finance announced it has crossed $7 billion in total bridge volume, signaling growing cross-chain demand for yield-bearing dollar assets.

items.title: Money Launderer Sentenced to 70 Months Over $263M Crypto Social-Engineering Scheme
items.desc: California money launderer Evan Tangeman admitted to having processed millions in stolen cryptocurrency proceeds.

items.title: MicroStrategy Purchases 3,273 Bitcoin for ~$255 Million; Polymarket Odds Show 10% Chance of Sale This Year
items.desc: MicroStrategy has acquired an additional 3,273 Bitcoin in a new purchase valued at approximately $255 million, while prediction market Polymarket sets 10% odds on the company selling any Bitcoin before year-end.

items.title: Bitcoin ETFs Extend Longest Win Streak Since September, But Spot Demand Lags
items.desc: The nine-day inflow streak saw spot Bitcoin ETFs draw in $2.1 billion, but experts warn of “net negative” on-chain demand.

items.title: Morning Minute: NFTs Storm Back, Led by Bored Apes
items.desc: Bitcoin made its highest weekly close since January. Western Union is launching a stablecoin. And NFTs are making a major comeback.

items.title: Western Union to Launch USDPT Stablecoin in May: Western Union
items.desc: Western Union plans to roll out its USDPT stablecoin next month, alongside a digital wallet network and Stable Card for global payments.

items.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 released
items.desc: Bitcoin Core version 31.0 is now available for download. See the release notes for more information about the bug fixes in this release. If you have any questions, please stop by the #bitcoin IRC chatroom (IRC, web) and we’ll do our best to help you.

items.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 released
items.desc: Bitcoin Core version 31.0 is now available for download. See the release notes for more information about the bug fixes in this release. If you have any questions, please stop by the #bitcoin IRC chatroom (IRC, web) and we’ll do our best to help you.
